flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Chippewa Valley Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (46.3% vs 53.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Chippewa Valley Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Chippewa Valley Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (63.6% → 72.0%).
